ocr_findings.description: Banner text '試験にはコレが出る！' rendered as '試験にはつしが出る！' — 'コレ' misread as 'つし', losing the emphasis keyword.

reviewer_notes: Page covers ニューラルネットワーク and モデル/ニューロン sections with body text and one diagram. All body paragraphs faithfully captured. The banner OCR error ('コレ'→'つし') is a medium-severity substitution but does not affect the main content paragraphs.
